scripts.build: npm -w packages/statusforge run build && npm -w apps/demo run build
scripts.lint: npm -w packages/statusforge run lint && npm -w apps/demo run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w packages/statusforge run typecheck && npm -w apps/demo run typecheck
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm -w packages/statusforge run build:watch" "npm -w apps/demo run dev"
